allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add screenshot capture to price submission flow

Extension changes:
- Add tabs permission for captureVisibleTab API
- Add captureScreenshot handler in background.js
- Capture screenshot when user selects price element
- New side-by-side modal UI with screenshot panel and form
- Canvas-based blur tool for privacy \(draw rectangles to pixelate\)
- Include screenshot URL and isFinalPrice in submission

Backend changes:
- New /api/upload-screenshot endpoint for Supabase Storage
- Update save-price to accept screenshotUrl and store in DB
- Update moderate page to display screenshot proof
- Add screenshot_url field to PriceHistory type

Type fixes:
- Add missing fields to Store interface \(latitude, longitude, etc.\)
- Add condition, fulfillment_type, product_type to LatestPrice
- Fix array handling for Supabase joined relations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git rm web/DESIGN.md web/LOCATION_SETUP.md web/MAPBOX_SETUP.md web/MIGRATION-GUIDE.md web/RATE_LIMITING.md web/RUN_MIGRATION.md web/docs/AUTH_ISSUES.md web/migration-add-regional-pricing.sql web/supabase-schema.sql)
